availableSince: Long-standing — part of the system/callbacks API

signing.note: CW Manage's signing is weaker than HMAC-SHA256 used by modern services. When feasible, also protect the callback URL with Basic auth credentials embedded in the registered URL.

transport.queryParameters: CW Manage appends ?id={entityId}&action={action}&type={type}&memberId={user} to the target URL, ALONGSIDE the body. Receivers should read query params for routing.
transport.timeout: Approximately 5 seconds. Non-2xx or slow responses cause aggressive retries that show up under Audit Trail > Callback Activity.
transport.retries: Retries visible in UI; failed deliveries don't disable the callback automatically.

notes: Payload shape below reflects the modern JSON callback body. Older deployments may send XML — configure Accept header on the receiver.
The 'Entity' field may be absent for minimal callbacks; receivers that need the full record should GET /service/tickets/{id} using API credentials.
All samples are synthesized from the documented envelope and representative GET responses.
